facts.text: .screensaver { filter: blur(8px); } .vhs { position: absolute; font-family: "Press Start 2P", cursive; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(23, 29, 168, 0.98); overflow: hidden; -webkit-animation: blue-me 10ms infinite; animation: blue-me 10ms infinite; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: 1991; } .vhs:after { box-shadow: inset 0 0 3em rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75); position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 1992; content: ""; } .vhs-message { -webkit-animation: track 5ms infinite; animation: track 5ms infinite; position: relative; margin: 4em; } .vhs h1 { position: absolute; font-size: 4vw; left: 0; filter: blur(3px); color: #fff; color: #fff; text-shadow: 1px 3px green, -2px -3px red; } .vhs h1:nth-child(2) { left: 60%; } .vhs-message span { -webkit-animation: blur 30ms infinite, flick 50ms infinite, jump 50ms infinite; animation: blur 30ms infinite, flick 50ms infinite, jump 50ms infinite; } @keyframes blur { 0% { filter: blur(1px); opacity: 0.8; } 50% { filter: blur(1px); opacity: 1; } 100% { filter: blur(1px); opacity: 0.8; } } @keyframes flick { 50% { left: 2px; } 51% { left: 0; } } @keyframes jump { 30% { top: 10px; } 31% { top: 0; } } @keyframes track { 40% { opacity: 1; top: 0; left: 0; transform: scale(1, 1); transform: skew(0, 0); } 41% { opacity: 0.8; top: 0px; left: -100px; transform: scale(1, 1.2); transform: skew(50deg, 0); } 42% { opacity: 0.8; top: 0px; left: 100px; transform: scale(1, 1.2); transform: skew(-80deg, 0); } 43% { opacity: 1; top: 0; left: 0; transform: scale(1, 1); transform: skew(0, 0); } } .vhs .screen-bottom { position: fixed; bottom: 0; width: 100%; } .vhs .line { width: 100%; height: 3px; position: relative; -webkit-animation: appear 1s infinite, flick 1s infinite, big-jump 5ms infinite; animation: appear 1s infinite, flick 1s infinite, big-jump 5ms infinite; } .vhs .line .white { background: white; position: relative; top: 0; left: 0; height: 4px; } .vhs .line .red { background: red; position: relative; top: 0; left: 0; height: 1px; } .vhs .line .green { background: green; position: relative; top: 0; left: 0; height: 1px; } @keyframes appear { 0% { filter: blur(5px); opacity: 0.85; } 50% { filter: blur(3px); opacity: 0.85; } 100% { filter: blur(4px); opacity: 0.85; } } @keyframes big-jump { 0% { top: 0; } 10% { top: -100px; } 12% { top: 0; } 54% { top: 0; } 55% { top: -300px; } 56% { top: 0; } 86% { top: 0; } 87% { top: -600px; } 88% { top: 0; } } #tv { padding: 0; margin: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; -webkit-animation: showHide 3s infinite; animation: showHide 3s infinite; } #tv { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0); -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden; -webkit-perspective: 1000; z-index: 1994; } @keyframes showHide { 1% { opacity: 0; } 10% { opacity: 1; } 19% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 0; } }
